name: Amazon Ads
description: Amazon Advertising API v3 — Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns plus Amazon DSP. LWA OAuth2; every call requires Amazon-Advertising-API-ClientId and (after profile selection) Amazon-Advertising-API-Scope (the profile_id).

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: access_token
credential_fields.description: LWA access token (1-hour TTL — refresh with refresh_token)

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: LWA Client ID
credential_fields.description: Client ID from your Login with Amazon security profile

credential_fields.name: profile_id
credential_fields.label: Profile ID
credential_fields.description: Default Amazon-Advertising-API-Scope value. Discover via list_profiles.

tools.name: list_profiles
tools.description: List advertiser profiles the authenticated user has access to. Each profile carries a profileId (used as Amazon-Advertising-API-Scope on all subsequent calls), countryCode, currencyCode, accountInfo (advertiser type and marketplace).

tools.name: sp_list_campaigns
tools.description: Sponsored Products: list campaigns. Filter by campaignId, name, state (enabled|paused|archived), portfolioId. Returns up to maxResults per page; use nextToken from response for paging.

tools.name: sp_create_campaign
tools.description: Sponsored Products: create one or more campaigns. Each campaign requires name, targetingType (MANUAL|AUTO), state (ENABLED|PAUSED), startDate (YYYY-MM-DD), budget {budgetType: DAILY, budget: number}, dynamicBidding {strategy: LEGACY_FOR_SALES|AUTO_FOR_SALES|MANUAL|RULE_BASED}.

tools.name: sp_update_campaign
tools.description: Sponsored Products: update existing campaigns. Each item must include campaignId; only provided fields are mutated.

tools.name: sp_list_ad_groups
tools.description: Sponsored Products: list ad groups. Filter by campaignId, state, name.

tools.name: sp_create_ad_group
tools.description: Sponsored Products: create one or more ad groups. Each requires campaignId, name, defaultBid, state.

tools.name: sp_list_keywords
tools.description: Sponsored Products: list keywords. Filter by adGroupId or campaignId, matchType (EXACT|PHRASE|BROAD), state.

tools.name: sp_create_keywords
tools.description: Sponsored Products: bid keywords into an ad group. Each requires campaignId, adGroupId, keywordText, matchType, state, bid.

tools.name: sb_list_campaigns
tools.description: Sponsored Brands: list campaigns. Same filtering shape as Sponsored Products.

tools.name: create_report
tools.description: v3 Reporting: request an async performance report. configuration determines reportTypeId (e.g. spCampaigns, spTargeting, sbCampaigns, sdCampaigns), groupBy, columns, filters, timeUnit (DAILY|SUMMARY), format (GZIP_JSON), and reportTypeId. Polled via get_report.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Poll an async report by reportId. When status=COMPLETED, the response contains url (a presigned S3 link, valid 60s) for the gzipped JSON output.
